data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value:
SELECT (select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as coop_name, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receipt_no as receipt_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no) as member_name, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.kep_method_amount as recept_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai ( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.kep_method_amount ) as thai_recept_amount,
( select nvl(sum( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.mpost_principal_balance + sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.unkeep_principal_of_loan),0) from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det ,sc_kep_m_ucf_keeping_item_type where 1=1 and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.keeping_type_code = sc_kep_m_ucf_keeping_item_type.keeping_type_code and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_year = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_month = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.seq_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.seq_no and sc_kep_m_ucf_keeping_item_type.keeping_type_group = 'LON' ) as balance ,
( select nvl(sum( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.principal_not ),0) from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det ,sc_kep_m_ucf_keeping_item_type where 1=1 and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.keeping_type_code = sc_kep_m_ucf_keeping_item_type.keeping_type_code and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_year = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_month = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.seq_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.seq_no and sc_kep_m_ucf_keeping_item_type.keeping_type_group = 'LON' ) as principal_amount ,
( select nvl(sum( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.interest_not ),0) from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det ,sc_kep_m_ucf_keeping_item_type where 1=1 and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.keeping_type_code = sc_kep_m_ucf_keeping_item_type.keeping_type_code and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_year = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_month = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.seq_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.seq_no and sc_kep_m_ucf_keeping_item_type.keeping_type_group = 'LON' ) as interest_amount ,
sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receipt_date as receipt_date, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no as membership_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.total_interest_value as total_interest, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.total_share_value as share_stock, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control) as group_control_name,
decode( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.amount_form_file , 0 , 'หัก ณ ที่จ่ายไม่ได้' , 'ตัวแทนนำส่ง ' || trim( to_char( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.amount_form_file , '9,999,999.99' ) ) ) as remark
, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month
FROM sc_kep_t_monthly_receive, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group WHERE 1 = 2 /*WHERE*/ --and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year = 2022 --and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month = 1 --and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no = '005004'
ORDER BY sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no ASC
